title: blumea lacera var. blumei
intro: Blumea lacera var. blumei, also known as Blue Thistle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Blumea lacera var. blumei include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. Blumea lacera var. blumei is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
